The '''Mission to Corellia''' was a mission carried out by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Ylenic It'kla]] seven days after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].

==The mission==
[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] sent the two Jedi to find the scientist [[Ratri Tane]], who possessed very valuable information.

Aayla and Ylenic arrived on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and entered the [[Homestar]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], where Aayla accidentally [[The Force/Legends|Force]] pushed an irritating [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] named [[Lorfo]], getting the attention of three [[Gotal/Legends|Gotals]] who were also looking for Tane.

A fight broke out between the Gotals and Jedi (leaving one of the Gotals dead), and the Jedi left the cantina, where [[Rostek Horn]] urged them to leave the planet. They were approached by Lorfo, who agreed to lead them to the Gotals' hideout for a few [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. When they arrived there however, they were seemingly betrayed by Lorfo to the two remaining Gotals and [[Tendir Blue]], a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] working for [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].

The Jedi dispatched Tendir and the Gotals, and soon discovered that Ratri Tane had already escaped Corellia and was actually being impersonated by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]]. The whole mission had been engineered by the Jedi Council, [[Corellian Jedi]], Rostek Horn and Lorfo to convince the Separatists they had the real information when in fact the true data was already in the hands of the Republic.The Jedi intially planned to implant fake memories into the unconscious Tendir's mind convincing him that he had succeeded in getting the data, but realised that Dooku would probe his mind to find out the truth. Instead, Lorfo convinced Tendir that he'd killed Ylenic but that Aayla was still after him and he had to escape. Aayla pretended to pursue him and Tendir escaped, delivering the false information to the Confederacy.
